tool.name: Rivet
tool.description: Workflow builder for AI pipelines with desktop-first self-hosting support.
tool.statusNote: No releases in 8+ months. Appears to be in maintenance or slow development.
tool.logoNotes: Official Rivet app logo from the owner-controlled Rivet homepage nav asset (`img/logo.svg`). Kept as a square service icon because the published asset is a square mark rather than a wide wordmark.
tool.practitionerNote: Can still work for narrow visual pipeline use cases, but the maintenance signal makes it a cautious choice for new enterprise standardisation.

dataResidency.detail: Desktop application; data stays on the local machine; no vendor cloud.

deployment.detail: Desktop app (macOS/Windows/Linux) and embeddable Node/TS library; no vendor cloud.

soc2.detail: No managed cloud service; user-operated desktop app.

iso27001.detail: No managed cloud service to certify.

iso42001.detail: Not a cloud AI system provider.

euAiAct.detail: Desktop visual pipeline builder, not an AI model/provider.
